title: Voice of the Whistler
writer: Wilfrid H. Pettitt, William Castle, Allan Radar
actors: Richard Dix, Lynn Merrick, Rhys Williams
plot: The 4th film of the Columbia series based on the CBS radio program, "The Whistler", finds wealthy John Sinclair, with no health or friends, being advised by his doctor to take a long vacation. Heading for the Great Lakes, he becom...
